# Universal Emotion Ledger (250)

This ledger tracks the formalization status of all 250 emotions within the Gnosis theorem surface.

## Tier 1: Primary Emotions (7)
- **Joy** (Primary, Joy, Positive, Moderate)
- **Anger** (Primary, Anger, Negative, High)
- **Sadness** (Primary, Sadness, Negative, Low)
- **Fear** (Primary, Fear, Negative, High)
- **Disgust** (Primary, Disgust, Negative, Low)
- **Surprise** (Primary, Surprise, Mixed, High)
- **EmotionalPain** (Primary, EmotionalPain, Negative, High)

## Tier 2: Secondary Emotions (65)
...
(Extracted from shared-ui/data/secondaryEmotions)

## Tier 3: Tertiary Emotions (169 + 9 Novel)
...
(Extracted from shared-ui/data/tertiaryEmotions + novel gap filling)

## Gap Filling (Novel Emotions)
- **Lull** (Novel, Neutral, Very Low)
- **Poise** (Novel, Neutral, Very High)
- **Yoin** (Novel, Mixed, Very Low)
- **Tremendum** (Novel, Mixed, Very High)
- **Onni** (Novel, Positive, Very Low)
- **Rapture** (Novel, Positive, Very High)
- **Aporia** (Novel, surprise, neutral, moderate)
- **Tension** (Novel, anger, negative, very low)
- **Melancholia** (Novel, sadness, negative, low)
